notes: fixture session: ROP chain fail — gadget search finds candidates but CFI policy too restrictive for chain assembly with available primitives

exploit_ropgadget found 200+ raw gadgets but after CFI filtering only 8 survive, none providing a usable stack pivot. The write primitive reach is too narrow (4 bytes past the vtable pointer) to chain without a pivot. disasm_radare2_gadgets confirmed no xchg/mov rsp sequences in CFI-valid landing pads.
